violations.text: Menus are lacking an allergen advisory statement. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2025
Handwashing sinks are lacking notification signage. State signage provided during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
Gaskets for reach-in freezer were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the walk-in cooler, sides at prep unit and fanguards in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
Exposed Insulation observed inside 1 door freezer unit located on back of the preparation area was not in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the fan and ceiling at the walk-in cooler, inside 1 door freezer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024

The floor under mop sink and floor under shelve in the kitchen area has an accumulation of old droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2024
The ventilation hood system has an accumulation of grease the must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
